---
title: "Reference"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.container}
# Reference

Use this page to navigate function-level documentation quickly. Conceptual guidance stays in Quarto; full API details remain in pkgdown.

[Open API index](pkgdown/reference/index.html){.btn .btn-primary}
[Open articles index](pkgdown/articles/index.html){.btn .btn-outline-light}
:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.container}

::: {.grid-3}

::: {.cardx}
### Core workflows
Jump to build/run and prediction-oriented APIs.
- [run_mcmc_bundle_manual](pkgdown/reference/run_mcmc_bundle_manual.html)
- [predict.mixgpd_fit](pkgdown/reference/predict.mixgpd_fit.html)
- [plot.mixgpd_fit](pkgdown/reference/plot.mixgpd_fit.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Causal workflows
Entry points for causal bundles, fitting, and effect summaries.
- [build_causal_bundle](pkgdown/reference/build_causal_bundle.html)
- [run_mcmc_causal](pkgdown/reference/run_mcmc_causal.html)
- [ate](pkgdown/reference/ate.html)
- [qte](pkgdown/reference/qte.html)
:::

::: {.cardx}
### Registries and support
Discover supported kernels and tail combinations.
- [get_kernel_registry](pkgdown/reference/get_kernel_registry.html)
- [get_tail_registry](pkgdown/reference/get_tail_registry.html)
- [kernel_support_table](pkgdown/reference/kernel_support_table.html)
:::

:::

:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.container}

## Where to go next

1. If you are still choosing a model setup, start at [Decision Guide](decision-guide.html).
2. If you need worked examples, go to [Examples](Examples/index.html).
3. If you need exact arguments and return values, stay in [pkgdown reference](pkgdown/reference/index.html).

:::
:::
